text: My name is John Smith, SSN 123-45-6789. There's a huge pothole on 123 Main St in Midtown that damaged my car. My phone number is (901) 555-0147.
I've been waiting 3 weeks for someone to fix the broken streetlight on Beale Street. This is completely unacceptable and dangerous for my family!
Hay un bache grande en la calle Union Avenue cerca de la escuela. Mi nombre es Carlos Rivera y vivo en 456 Oak Drive.
Thank you for fixing the water main break on Poplar Avenue so quickly! Great response time by the city crew. Really appreciate the service.
Tôi muốn báo cáo tiếng ồn lớn từ công trường xây dựng trên đường Summer Avenue. Tên tôi là Nguyen Van Minh, số điện thoại 901-555-0238.
There's graffiti all over the bridge at Overton Park. It appeared sometime last weekend. The tags are on both sides of the pedestrian walkway.
Patricia Johnson here, account number 44-8821. The sewer is backing up at 789 Elm Street in Whitehaven. It's been three days and the smell is terrible. Contact me at patricia.johnson@email.com.
The trash hasn't been picked up on our block for two weeks now. Some neighbors are happy about the new recycling bins though. Mixed feelings overall on Orange Mound services.
I submitted a pothole repair request last month, case number 311-2025-044. Can I get a status update on when the crew is scheduled to come out?
Where can I find the recycling schedule for Orange Mound? I also need information on how to sign up for bulk trash pickup.
